nasb.text: As for you also, because of the blood of My covenant with you, I have set your prisoners free from the waterless pit.

esv.text: As for you also, because of the blood of my covenant with you, I will set your prisoners free from the waterless pit.

cnv.text: 錫安哪！至於你，因著我與你立約的血，我把你中間被囚禁的人從無水的坑裡釋放出來。

ccb.text: 锡安啊，因为我用血跟你立了约， 我必将你中间被掳的人从无水之坑释放出来。
